versions.changelog:
## Changelog

### Refactor
- Remove unused code and dead injection path (unused imports, dead file-based index.html cleanup, misnamed JS polling functions)

### Features
- Rename plugin display name to **Active Streams**

### Fixes
- Update build.yaml targetAbi and framework to match CI config
- Fix CI: fetch release upload_url from API for workflow_dispatch
- Fix CI: add contents: write permission for release asset upload

### Style
- Fix checkbox overlap with back button on config page
- Add padding around config page settings
- Auto-save config on checkbox change, remove save button

Initial release of ActiveStreams plugin.

- Show active streams in a dashboard widget
- Configuration page for plugin settings
- Real-time stream session monitoring
